revision.comment: add {{[[Template:CatAutoTOC|CatAutoTOC]]}}, which will generate a table of contents (TOC) if the category has enough pages to need one
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia2]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Navseasoncats}} {{CatAutoTOC}}
[[Category:12th-century Buddhism|Budd]] [[Category:12th-century people by religion|Buddhists]] [[Category:Buddhists by century]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia2]] [[en:12th-century Buddhists]][[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia2]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Text replacement - "(?<!<noinclude>)\{\{\s*[dD]raft categories\|([^}]+)\}\}(?!<\/noinclude>)" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|\1}}</noinclude> "
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
revision.text:
{{Navseasoncats}} {{CatAutoTOC}}
<noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:12th-century Buddhism|Budd]] [[Category:12th-century people by religion|Buddhists]] [[Category:Buddhists by century]] }}</noinclude>
[[en:12th-century Buddhists]] [[Category:Categories with 2 members]]
[[en:Category:12th-century Buddhists]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{Navseasoncats}} {{CatAutoTOC}} <noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:12th-century Buddhism|Budd]] [[Category:12th-century people by religion|Buddhists]] [[Category:Buddhists by century]] }}</noinclude> [[en:12th-century Buddhists]] [[Category:Categories with 2 members]] [[en:Category:12th-century Buddhists]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
revision.text: {{Navseasoncats}} {{CatAutoTOC}} <noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:12th-century Buddhism|Budd]] [[Category:12th-century people by religion|Buddhists]] [[Category:Buddhists by century]] }}</noinclude> [[en:12th-century Buddhists]] [[Category:Categories with 2 members]] [[en:Category:12th-century Buddhists]] [[en:Category:12th-century Buddhists]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]
